description_long: This object is a modern shotgun with a sleek, elongated barrel and a compact receiver. The barrel is notably long and appears to be made of dark, possibly blued or matte-finished metal, with subtle texturing or patterning along its length. The receiver features a red button or safety catch and a visible ejection port, suggesting semi-automatic operation. The grip is ergonomic, shaped for a comfortable hold, and the trigger guard is rounded and generously sized for finger access. The shotgun lacks a traditional full stock, instead featuring a pistol grip for maneuverability. Overall, the design is utilitarian and robust, suitable for urban tactical or law enforcement scenarios.
description: A modern, long-barreled shotgun with a pistol grip, dark metal finish, and a red safety button, designed for tactical use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the circular muzzle opening and the narrow profile of the barrel.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full length of the barrel, the red safety button, ejection port, and ergonomic pistol grip.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the back of the receiver and the alignment of the barrel, with the grip and trigger guard visible below.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the same features as view 1, with the safety button and grip clearly visible.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, long and smooth with no visible ribbing or venting
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with smooth contours and no finger grooves
